approve-FFv2.prompt: Run the FFv2 approval script with the following parameters: python Q:/src/local_skills/data_tools/ffv2-approve.py {{EXTRA_ARGS}}. This approves pending Feature Flight V2 rollout approvals and flight requests via headless Edge CDP and the FFv2 API. Report the results summary printed by the script.
approve-FFv2.description: Approve pending FFv2 flight rollout approvals and flight requests
